---
title: "The Theory of Quantum Information"
subtitle: "Study Notes & Roadmap"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

## 学習状況ダッシュボード

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
### 現在のフォーカス: 1.1 Linear algebra
数学的基礎、特に複素内積空間と線形代数の復習を行っています。

[👉 Section 1.1 のノートを開く](notes/chapter1/1.1-linear-algebra.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.callout-note}
## 進捗率
- **Chapter 1**: 🚧 5%
- **...**
:::
:::

:::

## 学習ノート一覧

### Chapter 1: Mathematical Preliminaries [[📄 PDF](../divided/Chapter1_Math.pdf)]{style="font-size: 0.7em; vertical-align: middle; background: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; color: #6c757d; margin-left: 10px;"}

| Section | Title | Notes | Status |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--: |
| **1.1** | Linear algebra | [📝 Note](notes/chapter1/1.1-linear-algebra.qmd) | 🚧 |
| **1.2** | Analysis, convex analysis, and semidefinite programming | [🌑 Note](notes/chapter1/1.2-analysis.qmd) | 🌑 |

<br>

### Chapter 2: Basic Notions [[📄 PDF](../divided/Chapter2_Basic.pdf)]{style="font-size: 0.7em; vertical-align: middle; background: #f8f9fa; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; color: #6c757d; margin-left: 10px;"}

| Section | Title | Notes | Status |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--: |
| **2.1** | Registers and states | - | 🌑 |
| **2.2** | Quantum channels | - | 🌑 |
| **2.3** | Measurements | - | 🌑 |
